picks.rationale: A spiral notebook on its cover mirrors the post's recurring image of the small notebook kept for thoughts retrieved from walks.
A vintage compass rose evokes navigation and wayfinding — a fitting metaphor for walking as a method of orienting one's thinking.
Two ornate gothic arrow/divider stickers with compass rose medallions evoke the directional tension of moving from 'is' to 'ought' — a visual metaphor for the philosophical seam Hume traces.
A vintage pointing hand with ruffled cuff quietly mirrors Hume's own gesture of marking the move — pointing at something without fully condemning it.
Ornate arrow/divider stickers with scrollwork and compass rose medallions visually echo the tick bar's role as a navigation and position indicator along a linear sequence.
A vintage compass rose sticker — a classic navigation aid — mirrors the post's core theme of orienting readers within a stream of content.
